features.name: async reset event control with complemented signal
features.description: Code should include an always block with async reset sensitivity list using a complemented reset signal
features.snippet:
always @(posedge clock or posedge reset);
  if (reset) begin end

features.name: redundant reset condition inside async reset always block
features.description: Code should include an if condition checking the complemented reset signal inside an always block that already uses the same complemented signal in its sensitivity list
